## Description

Please provide a brief summary of your changes. If you are adding a new resource, explain why it's "awesome" and how it fits into the project.

## Contribution Maturity (30-Day Rule)

- [ ] I confirm that this resource is at least **30 days old** and demonstrates community activity or stability. (Required for new submissions)

## Structured Resource Entry Format

- [ ] My entry follows the strict schema: `[Clean Title](URL) ![Badge](BadgeURL) - One concise sentence explaining why it’s awesome. #Tag1 #Tag2`
- [ ] I have added the entry to the appropriate **Diátaxis category** (Tutorials, How-To Guides, Reference, or Explanation).

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) document.
- [ ] My commit messages follow the **Conventional Commits** standard (e.g., `feat:`, `fix:`).
- [ ] I have run `npx awesome-lint` locally to validate my changes (if applicable).
- [ ] All links are functional and point to high-quality content.

## Related Issues

Fixes # (issue number)

## Screenshots (if applicable)

If your change involves visual updates or documentation improvements, please include screenshots here.
